reason: 7690 lines changed (26 source files, +1765/-1440 net) since wiki commit 2ca87b44 — below 10k threshold; major internal refactoring only
deltaSummary: Pure refactoring: (1) AI pipeline modularization — split local-agent.ts, translator.ts, deterministic-validator.ts into focused modules (limits, utils, text helpers, periods, validator-helpers, TTL cache); (2) UI wizard extraction — moved page components out of monolithic TimetableApp.tsx (~865 LOC reduction) into components/ (PreviewPage, SetupPages, TimetableFields) plus small helpers. No new features, subsystems, routes, or ConstraintKinds. Behavior, contracts, and security model unchanged.

pagesToUpdate.title: Tack Timetable
pagesToUpdate.rationale: Directory layout tree, key abstractions table, integration points, and 'Entry points for modification' list old flat ai/ structure and monolithic TimetableApp.tsx. Must reflect new modules and components/ extraction.

pagesToUpdate.title: Architecture
pagesToUpdate.rationale: Layer 2 description and file references in the AI pipeline section reference old monolithic stage files. High-level diagrams are stable but captions/see-also lists should acknowledge the new module boundaries for accuracy.

pagesToUpdate.title: Getting started
pagesToUpdate.rationale: Minor: verify any new npm scripts or pre-sync behavior introduced by the refactors; mostly stable. Include note on component extraction if it affects local dev mental model.

pagesToUpdate.title: AI Pipeline
pagesToUpdate.rationale: PRIMARY IMPACT. Directory layout tree is completely stale. Orchestration logic and contracts are unchanged.

pagesToUpdate.title: Translator Stage
pagesToUpdate.rationale: How-it-works diagram and prose reference internals that moved to translator-text.ts and translator-periods.ts. File reference tables and key source files list must be expanded with the three new translator modules. Prompt contract and error handling are stable.

pagesToUpdate.title: Validation Stage
pagesToUpdate.rationale: Core entry points and key source files sections reference monolithic deterministic-validator.ts. Must document validator-helpers.ts split. Coverage and round-trip logic are stable.

pagesToUpdate.title: Scheduling Wizard
pagesToUpdate.rationale: PRIMARY IMPACT. Directory layout shows only TimetableApp.tsx. Key abstractions describe state that is now delegated. Key source files table and entry points for modification must list the three new component files (PreviewPage, SetupPages, TimetableFields) and note the orchestrator pattern.

pagesToUpdate.title: Constraint System
pagesToUpdate.rationale: Minor: constraint-registry.ts grew slightly (+8 lines). Verify CHECKED_KINDS / registry surface and hasChecker flags are still accurately described. No new kinds in this delta.

pagesToUpdate.title: Patterns and conventions
pagesToUpdate.rationale: Verify that the refactoring did not introduce new cross-cutting patterns (e.g., barrel exports, test colocations) that should be documented. GitNexus impact rule and security sections remain unchanged and still apply.

pagesToUpdate.title: By the Numbers
pagesToUpdate.rationale: ALWAYS REFRESH in incremental mode. Git history, churn hotspots (the 26 files), file counts, and complexity metrics have changed since the last snapshot.

pagesToUpdate.title: Lore
pagesToUpdate.rationale: OPTIONAL. The commit message is 'Init Harness Engineering' with no user-visible feature change. Consider adding a single-sentence note under the most recent era about internal modularization of the AI pipeline and UI wizard (May 2026). Not required for correctness.

specialHandling.byTheNumbers: Must be regenerated from current git history and source tree (always in incremental mode).
specialHandling.lore: Update only if the change warrants a new historical marker; otherwise leave as-is or add one sentence.
specialHandling.crossLinkAudit: After updates, run a final pass to ensure all 'see also' and relative links between overview/, systems/, and features/ still resolve (file paths inside backticks and prose were the main things changed).

executionNotes: Sub-agents (or direct edits) must preserve existing page structure, tone, and Mermaid diagrams. Only update directory trees, file tables, key abstractions, and 'Entry points' sections. Do not rewrite conceptual explanations unless they contain stale file paths.
